name: Giuseppe Del Giudice
text: I contacted Citerastudio because I needed professionals with proven experience for a problem that was not easy to solve: my garden is located on the bank of a stream, and one day, following a landslide, it had almost completely disappeared. Using natural engineering techniques, it was possible to recreate the garden's surface by involving all of my neighbors who were affected by the same problem. The result of this operation was to make the garden space safe and to integrate the consolidation works perfectly into the landscape context of the area. Respecting costs and timelines proved even more delicate to achieve, given the need to involve multiple parties. I highly recommend them for the professionalism they demonstrated.
